metadata.description: A tall yellow sunflower with a dark brown center, bright petals reaching toward the sun
suggested_actions: look at the seeds in the center

agent_hints.body-agent: A single sunflower is right ahead. Show gentle curiosity, lean in to examine the petals closely.
agent_hints.rover-agent: A sunflower is straight ahead. Drive forward slowly to get a closer look.
agent_hints.butterfly-agent: A sunflower! Fly to it eagerly and circle around it, looking for nectar.
agent_hints.identify-agent: Use WONDER mode. Talk about how sunflowers follow the sun across the sky. Be amazed by the spiral pattern of seeds in the center.

discoveries.description: Butterfly flew up high and spotted a whole field of sunflowers stretching out to the right! There must be hundreds of them!
suggested_actions: count how many you can see

metadata.description: A huge field of bright yellow sunflowers stretching as far as you can see, all facing the same direction

agent_hints.body-agent: A whole field of sunflowers! Look around excitedly, wiggle with delight at how many there are.
agent_hints.rover-agent: A sunflower field to explore! Drive along the edge slowly, taking it all in.
agent_hints.butterfly-agent: So many flowers! Fly between the sunflowers, hopping from one to the next.
agent_hints.identify-agent: Use CHALLENGE mode. Challenge the child to guess how many sunflowers are in the field. Talk about how sunflowers grow in groups and all face the same direction.

discoveries.description: Butterfly found a tiny baby sunflower growing between the big ones! It's just starting to open its petals!
suggested_actions: guess how tall it will grow
compare it to the big ones
